Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Forum Non Conveniens Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Action Pursuant To Ccp Sections 410.30 And 418.1
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ABLE ENGINEERING SERVICES, INC. Motion to Dismiss Action for Forum Non Conveniens or, in the Alternative, to Stay Action Pursuant to CCP Sections 410.30 and 418.1. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted in part. Court stays this action, pursuant to stipulation. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604
